query:
UPDATE riviamigo.geofences
           SET name = $3,
               latitude = $4,
               longitude = $5,
               radius_m = $6,
               address_id = $7,
               is_home = $8,
               is_work = $9,
               cost_profile_id = $10,
               updated_at = now()
           WHERE id = $1 AND user_id = $2
